mission: Compile one authoritative dependency degradation pack so gateway, command, projection, integration, and browser recovery posture consume the same bounded fallback law.

template.blast_radius_rule: maximumEscalationFamilyRefs[] must stay bounded and machine-checkable.

assumptions.summary: The assistive vendor lane is treated as a watch-shadow adapter boundary until a later phase freezes live invocation policy.
Standards and assurance sources use a synthetic watch-cache twin now so release-critical drift logic is testable without external fetches.
Optional PDS enrichment remains feature-flagged and may legally stay on a permanent simulator-backed path for some tenants.

profiles.patientFallbackState: Show sign-in succeeded but access is still being confirmed; do not imply full portal ownership yet.
profiles.staffFallbackState: Display the current binding state, route-intent fence, and any claim-pending blocker before staff attempt recovery.
profiles.manualFallbackDefault: Route to support-assisted recovery or a secure-link continuation path without widening identity truth.
profiles.closureBlockerImplications: NHS login authentication rail is closure-blocking: no calm patient close, booking confirmation, dispatch settlement, or route completion may proceed while proof remains ambiguous, degraded, or manual-only.
profiles.rationale: NHS login authentication rail is bounded to ['wf_command_orchestration', 'wf_projection_read_models', 'wf_assurance_security_control'] so provider degradation cannot silently widen across the platform.
profiles.supportFallbackState: Surface the redirect review, partner approval state, and subject-lineage mismatch cues needed for assisted recovery.
profiles.operationsFallbackState: Keep diagnostics visible, freeze controls, and show the bounded audience and workload radius.
profiles.governanceFallbackState: Inspect the bounded read-only posture and release-trust overlay before reopening mutation.
profiles.pharmacyFallbackState: Route to support-assisted recovery or a secure-link continuation path without widening identity truth.
profiles.hubFallbackState: Route to support-assisted recovery or a secure-link continuation path without widening identity truth.

profiles.authoritativeSuccessProof: Current SessionEstablishmentDecision plus current Session, IdentityBinding, and RouteIntentBinding showing writable authority for the same subject and lineage.
profiles.degradedModeDefault: Freeze the route in claim-pending or auth-read-only posture until writable authority is re-proven for the same subject and route intent.

profiles.patientFallbackState: Continue with the baseline identity journey and avoid mentioning unseen PDS enrichment.
profiles.staffFallbackState: Mark enrichment withheld, feature-flagged, or review-required and preserve local matching evidence separately.
profiles.manualFallbackDefault: Support-assisted correction or governed local review without changing the baseline identity contract.
profiles.closureBlockerImplications: Optional PDS enrichment seam stays feature-flagged or deferred; if enabled later, ambiguity still blocks truthful close and must not be flattened into optional success.
profiles.rationale: Optional PDS enrichment seam is bounded to ['wf_command_orchestration', 'wf_projection_read_models', 'wf_assurance_security_control'] so provider degradation cannot silently widen across the platform.

follow_on_dependencies.title: Patient-safe degraded copy can become richer later
follow_on_dependencies.bounded_seam: par_098 publishes deterministic placeholder and recovery posture now. Later shell work may refine surface wording without changing fallback mode, escalation ceiling, or mutation law.

follow_on_dependencies.title: Workspace explanation copy can refine later
follow_on_dependencies.bounded_seam: Staff, hub, support, and pharmacy copy remains intentionally terse here while the runtime fallback and recovery bindings are fixed.

follow_on_dependencies.title: Operations and governance diagnostics can gain richer incident copy later
follow_on_dependencies.bounded_seam: The bounded degradation law and assurance implications are authoritative here; later surfaces may enrich operator copy only.

gap_resolutions.summary: Where the corpus does not publish a richer escalation ceiling, par_098 chooses the narrowest backend family ceiling already declared by seq_057 and projects calm browser fallback on top of it rather than widening backend authority.
Audience-safe placeholders and read-only posture remain allowed presentation overlays even when the backend escalation ceiling excludes gateway or browser runtime families.
